description_long: This is a dark, bulbous ceramic vase with a narrow neck and a single, thick handle that arches from the upper neck to the shoulder. The surface is textured with vertical incised lines running from the shoulder to the base, giving it a hand-crafted, rustic appearance. The rim is slightly flared and shows some lighter wear, suggesting age or frequent use. The handle is robust and smoothly integrated into the body, with subtle curvature. The vase's finish is matte and uneven, with visible patches of lighter brown where the dark glaze has worn away. Its overall form and patina evoke traditional pottery often found in historical or outdoor urban settings.
description: A dark, textured ceramic vase with a narrow neck, flared rim, and a single thick handle, featuring incised vertical lines and a rustic, worn finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the handle on the right and the flared rim, with vertical incised lines and visible wear on the rim.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the handle and the continuous incised pattern, with less visible rim wear.
description_view_2: Side view with the handle on the left, showing the curvature of the handle and the textured body.
description_view_3: Opposite side view without the handle, focusing on the bulbous body and the incised vertical lines.
